ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the property */,
  "placed_in_service" INTEGER /* Year the property was placed in service */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "management_company" TEXT /* Name of the management company responsible for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the tenant */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property where the tenant resides */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tenant's lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tenant's lease */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact for the tenant */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenants_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease record */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant associated with the lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property where the lease is applicable */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease agreement */,
  "monthly_rent" REAL /* Monthly rent for the leased unit */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit for the leased unit */,
  "rent_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the rent is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant making the request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property where the request is made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance issue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the maintenance request (e.g., plumbing, electrical) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance request (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_workorders" (
  "workorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workorder */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance request associated with the workorder */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the workorder was assigned */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the workorder was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the workorder (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_workorders_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES maintenance_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, maintenance staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_properties" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property managed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the payroll record */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date when the payroll was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payroll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rent_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rent_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., occupancy, maintenance) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
